summary: Implement MasterPark netParkV2 client and reservation workflow.
reason: MasterPark exposes a WordPress AJAX flow rather than a published OpenAPI spec; this CLI wraps the real browser-observed endpoints.
validated_outcome: go fmt ./..., go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./cmd/masterpark-pp-cli, live locations/quote smoke tests, verify-mode reservation no-op.
